sources.title: Data from: Charcoal analysis for temperature reconstruction with infrared spectroscopy
sources.notes: Charcoal transmission FTIR spectra, 950-3500 cm^-1; reference chars at 200-800 deg C plus combustion-facility chars.

sources.title: Data from: Reconstructing past fire temperatures from ancient charcoal material
sources.notes: Modern reference charcoal and ancient charcoal FTIR spectra.

sources.title: A modern analogue matching approach to characterize fire temperatures and plant species from charcoal
sources.notes: R code and FTIR chemical spectra of reference charcoal data used in Maezumi et al. 2021.

sources.title: Biochar Stability Revealed by FTIR and Machine Learning
sources.notes: ATR-FTIR biochar spectra and stability-ratio data for multiple feedstocks and HTTs.

sources.title: Biochar from sewage sludge: effect of pyrolysis on functional properties and pollutants fate
sources.notes: Raw paper data; this downloader pulls the FTIR.xlsx spreadsheet only.

sources.title: Pb(II) adsorption by KOH-modified rice straw biochar from battery wastewater
sources.notes: FTIR CSV spectra for pristine rice-straw biochar, KOH-modified biochar, and Pb-loaded modified biochar.

sources.title: Aged and unaged pine wood pyrogenic organic matter
sources.notes: PyOM mineralization, elemental analysis, and FTIR relative peak-height data; not full raw spectra.

sources.title: Fourier Transformed Infrared (FTIR) Spectroscopy Data for Soil Carbon
sources.notes: Soil FTIR workbook from EPA/Data.gov; useful background fingerprints, not charcoal-only.

sources.title: ATR-FTIR spectral database of geological, experimental, and archaeological materials
sources.notes: Open ATR-FTIR reference library with sample-info spreadsheet plus Bruker OPUS and JCAMP-DX spectra.

sources.title: Binchotan charcoal as a renewable source for partial replacement of calcined petroleum coke in the aluminum industry
sources.notes: Binchotan thesis with extractable text and embedded material-characterization tables: proximate analysis, FTIR, SEM-EDS, TGA, density, HHV, resistivity, and XRD.

sources.title: Characteristics of White Charcoal Produced from the Charcoal Kiln for Thermotherapy
sources.notes: White-charcoal quality article with downloadable Excel tables for proximate analysis, density/pH/hygroscopicity, calorific value, hardness, and refinement degree.
